original_text: We are thrilled to present this amazing penthouse for sale in Santa Maria, Sal Island, Cape Verde, located on the third floor of a modern building in the very heart of the city. Designed with family living and comfort in mind, the property welcomes you with a hallway that opens into a large and bright dining and living area. A modern staircase leads to the upper floor, where you’ll find a spacious private terrace overlooking Santa Maria and the island. This rooftop space is perfect for creating a chill-out area, and it even has pre-installation for a Jacuzzi – ideal for enjoying the island lifestyle. The penthouse includes: Fully equipped modern kitchen with large worktop – a dream for cooking lovers Two intelligently designed bathrooms (one with a laundry corner) Furnished and tastefully decorated interior with quality finishes Thanks to its north-south orientation, the apartment benefits from excellent natural ventilation, keeping it fresh and comfortable even during the summer months. The property is ideally situated in the center of Santa Maria, within easy reach of supermarkets, restaurants, shops, and all essential services. This makes it not only a perfect residence but also an excellent real estate investment in Sal Island, with strong potential for holiday rentals.
